message:
fix: correct dry-run import counting and prevent DB modification (bd-77gm)

Two bugs in detectUpdates dry-run mode:
1. result.Updated was never set for collision candidates, causing
   dry-run to always report "update 0" even when updates would occur
2. When collisions > 0, dry-run fell through to RunInTransaction,
   actually modifying the database instead of just previewing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
